TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-intro_tamih
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mi pakafana' kaku tu urip aku.
S.PHON: mi pakafanaʡ kaku tu urip aku.
S.FORM: mi pakafana' kaku tu urip aku.
S.PHON: mi pakafanaʡ kaku tu urip aku.
S.TRANSL: 我來敘述我的一生.

TRANSL.notes: I am going to tell (the story) about my life.

S.TRANSL: I am going to tell about my life.

S.FORM: u ngangan aku ci tamih.
S.PHON: u ŋaŋan aku ʦi tamiħ.
S.FORM: u ngangan aku ci tamih.
S.PHON: u ŋaŋan aku ʦi tamiħ.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Tamih.
My name is Tamih.

S.FORM: ci tamih kuni pakalima nu mama atu ina takuwanan.
S.PHON: ʦi tamiħ kuni pakaɾima nu mama atu ina takuwanan.
S.FORM: ci tamih kuni pakalima nu mama atu ina takuwanan.
S.PHON: ʦi tamiħ kuni pakaɾima nu mama atu ina takuwanan.
S.TRANSL: Tamih的名字是我爸爸和媽媽給我取的.
My father and mother named me Tamih.

S.FORM: u suwal nu mihofucay takuwanan a ina atu mama aku yu mafuraw kuna niyaro' a tayni tuna paniyaro'an itiya a mahofuc i tisuwanan sa'an.
S.PHON: u suwaɾ nu miħo~ufuʦaj takuwanan a ina atu mama aku ju mafuraw kuna nijaro~uʡ a tajni tuna panijaro~uʡan itija a maħo~ufuʦ i tisuwanan saʡan.
S.FORM: u suwal nu mihofucay takuwanan a ina atu mama aku yu mafuraw kuna niyaro' a tayni tuna paniyaro'an itiya a mahofuc i tisuwanan sa'an.
S.PHON: u suwaɾ nu miħo~ufuʦaj takuwanan a ina atu mama aku ju mafuraw kuna nijaro~uʡ a tajni tuna panijaro~uʡan itija a maħo~ufuʦ i tisuwanan saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 生我的父母說,那時部落遷徙來到這個村落時生下你的,如此.
My mother and father, who gave birth to me, said 'you were born when we moved to this village.'

S.FORM: saka a a u miheca'an aku anini falu a polo ira ku c'cay.
S.PHON: saka a a u miħəʦaʡan aku anini faɾu a po~uɾo~u ira ku ʦʡʦaj.
S.FORM: saka a a u miheca'an aku anini falu a polo ira ku c'cay.
S.PHON: saka a a u miħəʦaʡan aku anini faɾu a po~uɾo~u ira ku ʦʡʦaj.
S.TRANSL: 所以,我現在的年齡,八十一歲.
Now, I am 81 years old.

S.FORM: a misatapangtu kaku tu sakafalu a polo ira ku tusa.
S.PHON: a misatapaŋtu kaku tu sakafaɾu a po~uɾo~u ira ku tusa.
S.FORM: a misatapangtu kaku tu sakafalu a polo ira ku tusa.
S.PHON: a misatapaŋtu kaku tu sakafaɾu a po~uɾo~u ira ku tusa.

TRANSL.notes: 我已經開始(進入)八十二歲.

S.TRANSL: 我已經開始 八十二歲.
I am almost 82 years old.

S.FORM: a itini kaku itini i i changpinkuosiaw a mitilid tu nu siawsuei.
S.PHON: a itini kaku itini i i ʦħaŋpinkuo~usiaw a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ tu nu siawsuəi.
S.FORM: a itini kaku itini i i changpinkuosiaw a mitilid tu nu siawsuei.
S.PHON: a itini kaku itini i i ʦħaŋpinkuo~usiaw a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ tu nu siawsuəi.
S.TRANSL: 我在長濱國小這裡唸小學.
I went to Chang-bin Elementary School here.

S.FORM: ta a maharek a mitilid tu siawsuei awa'ay ku papaka'en tu kulung sa ku matuasay.
S.PHON: ta a maħarək a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ tu siawsuəi awaʡaj ku papakaʡən tu kuɾuŋ sa ku matuasaj.
S.FORM: ta a maharek a mitilid tu siawsuei awa'ay ku papaka'en tu kulung sa ku matuasay.
S.PHON: ta a maħarək a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ tu siawsuəi awaʡaj ku papakaʡən tu kuɾuŋ sa ku matuasaj.
S.TRANSL: 到我結束小學學業,當時老人家說沒有人餵牛.
After I graduated from elementary school, the elders said, 'no one could take care of the cows.'

S.FORM: saka i luma' satu kaku a paka'en tu kulung.
S.PHON: saka i ɾumaʡ satu kaku a pakaʡən tu kuɾuŋ.
S.FORM: saka i luma' satu kaku a paka'en tu kulung.
S.PHON: saka i ɾumaʡ satu kaku a pakaʡən tu kuɾuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 所以我一直在家餵牛.
Thus, I stayed at home to take care of the cows.

S.FORM: mangalay a mitilid.
S.PHON: maŋaɾaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: mangalay a mitilid.
S.PHON: maŋaɾaj a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 我想要念書.
I wanted to study.

S.FORM: nika ca'ayay ka a edeng ku kamay nu matuasay saka malami padangay.
S.PHON: nika ʦaʡajaj ka a əɬ~ɮəŋ ku kamaj nu matuasaj saka maɾami paɬ~ɮaŋaj.
S.FORM: nika ca'ayay ka a edeng ku kamay nu matuasay saka malami padangay.
S.PHON: nika ʦaʡajaj ka a əɬ~ɮəŋ ku kamaj nu matuasaj saka maɾami paɬ~ɮaŋaj.
S.TRANSL: 但老人家的人手不夠;所以我成為幫手.
But there were not enough people to help the elders; thus I became their helper.

S.FORM: saka ta ma tuas kaku ma u kalalu'ud nu dipong atu nini u padaka itiya saka.
S.PHON: saka ta ma tuas kaku ma u kaɾaɾuʡuɬ~ɮ nu ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ atu nini u paɬ~ɮaka itija saka.
S.FORM: saka ta ma tuas kaku ma u kalalu'ud nu dipong atu nini u padaka itiya saka.
S.PHON: saka ta ma tuas kaku ma u kaɾaɾuʡuɬ~ɮ nu ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ atu nini u paɬ~ɮaka itija saka.
S.TRANSL: 我稍微長大後,那時候日本和美國正在打仗.
When I grew up, there was a war between Japan and the US then.

S.FORM: malamisimaway kaku i tapulu tu mikacaway tu hikuki.
S.PHON: maɾamisimawaj kaku i tapuɾu tu mikaʦawaj tu ħikuki.
S.FORM: malamisimaway kaku i tapulu tu mikacaway tu hikuki.
S.PHON: maɾamisimawaj kaku i tapuɾu tu mikaʦawaj tu ħikuki.
S.TRANSL: 我成為駐守在山丘駐守,照顧監視飛機的人.
I was garrisoned in the hill to take care of the soldiers who guarded the planes.

S.FORM: anu ira ku hikuki nu u padaka u mami pakafana' a maemin.
S.PHON: anu ira ku ħikuki nu u paɬ~ɮaka u mami pakafanaʡ a maəmin.
S.FORM: anu ira ku hikuki nu u padaka u mami pakafana' a maemin.
S.PHON: anu ira ku ħikuki nu u paɬ~ɮaka u mami pakafanaʡ a maəmin.
S.TRANSL: 假如有美國的飛機,我都會通知.
If there were US planes, I would notify all the soldiers.

S.FORM: e sepat a miheca ta ku itira ta a malepuntu ku kalalu'ud sawad satu.
S.PHON: ə səpat a miħəʦa ta ku itira ta a maɾəpuntu ku kaɾaɾuʡuɬ~ɮ sawaɬ~ɮ satu.
S.FORM: e sepat a miheca ta ku itira ta a malepuntu ku kalalu'ud sawad satu.
S.PHON: ə səpat a miħəʦa ta ku itira ta a maɾəpuntu ku kaɾaɾuʡuɬ~ɮ sawaɬ~ɮ satu.
S.TRANSL: 我在那裡四年,戰爭結束了.
I stayed there for four years until the war was over.

S.FORM: ta mipadangtu kaku tu mihiya tunini u tayal nu matuasay.
S.PHON: ta mipaɬ~ɮaŋtu kaku tu miħija tunini u tajaɾ nu matuasaj.
S.FORM: ta mipadangtu kaku tu mihiya tunini u tayal nu matuasay.
S.PHON: ta mipaɬ~ɮaŋtu kaku tu miħija tunini u tajaɾ nu matuasaj.
S.TRANSL: 我就幫忙老人家的工作.
Then I helped the elders with their work.

S.FORM: malamalingaday ku tayal aku.
S.PHON: maɾamaɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj ku tajaɾ aku.
S.FORM: malamalingaday ku tayal aku.
S.PHON: maɾamaɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj ku tajaɾ aku.
S.TRANSL: 我的工作是務農.
My job was farming.

S.FORM: e na ma paharek ku kalalu'ud nu dipong i ira ku tayni ku hiya ku patenakay tu suwal nu kawas mipakafana'tu tunini u cituciaw hatiraay.
S.PHON: ə na ma paħarək ku kaɾaɾuʡuɬ~ɮ nu ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i ira ku tajni ku ħija ku patənakaj tu suwaɾ nu kawas mipakafanaʡtu tunini u ʦituʦiaw ħatiraaj.
S.FORM: e na ma paharek ku kalalu'ud nu dipong i ira ku tayni ku hiya ku patenakay tu suwal nu kawas mipakafana'tu tunini u cituciaw hatiraay.
S.PHON: ə na ma paħarək ku kaɾaɾuʡuɬ~ɮ nu ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ i ira ku tajni ku ħija ku patənakaj tu suwaɾ nu kawas mipakafanaʡtu tunini u ʦituʦiaw ħatiraaj.
S.TRANSL: 那時日本的戰爭結束,有人來傳授神的話語,傳授基督教這樣子.
After the war of Japan was over, someone came to preach the words of God, to preach Christianity.

S.FORM: fahka' ku falucu' aku tu nika s a pasifana' nuya patenakay tu suwal nu kawas.
S.PHON: faħkaʡ ku faɾuʦuʡ aku tu nika s a pasifanaʡ nuja patənakaj tu suwaɾ nu kawas.
S.FORM: fahka' ku falucu' aku tu nika s a pasifana' nuya patenakay tu suwal nu kawas.
S.PHON: faħkaʡ ku faɾuʦuʡ aku tu nika s a pasifanaʡ nuja patənakaj tu suwaɾ nu kawas.
S.TRANSL: 對於那個傳授神的話語的人,我心裡很驚訝.
I was amazed by the preacher.

S.FORM: saka a pasu'elintu kaku uninitu ku su'elinay sa kaku.
S.PHON: saka a pasuʡəɾintu kaku uninitu ku suʡəɾinaj sa kaku.
S.FORM: saka a pasu'elintu kaku uninitu ku su'elinay sa kaku.
S.PHON: saka a pasuʡəɾintu kaku uninitu ku suʡəɾinaj sa kaku.

TRANSL.notes: 我相信了,最真的(道理)就是這個.我如此想.

S.TRANSL: 我相信了,最真的 就是這個.我如此想.
I believed in it. It was the truth, I thought.

S.FORM: saka a a tusa miheca kuni kapisatayni ni nuya patenakay.
S.PHON: saka a a tusa miħəʦa kuni kapisatajni ni nuja patənakaj.
S.FORM: saka a a tusa miheca kuni kapisatayni ni nuya patenakay.
S.PHON: saka a a tusa miħəʦa kuni kapisatajni ni nuja patənakaj.
S.TRANSL: 這二年間那些宣教者不斷地來這.
During those two years, the preachers kept coming.

S.FORM: mapalaltu ku falucu' aku i.
S.PHON: mapaɾaɾtu ku faɾuʦuʡ aku i.
S.FORM: mapalaltu ku falucu' aku i.
S.PHON: mapaɾaɾtu ku faɾuʦuʡ aku i.
S.TRANSL: 我的心頓悟了.
My mind was enlightened.

S.FORM: ketun sa ku falucu' a pasu'elin.
S.PHON: kətun sa ku faɾuʦuʡ a pasuʡəɾin.
S.FORM: ketun sa ku falucu' a pasu'elin.
S.PHON: kətun sa ku faɾuʦuʡ a pasuʡəɾin.
S.TRANSL: 我決心要相信.
I firmly believed in it.

S.FORM: na itiya i a ira ku pikinkin pihiya pitahidang na nu hiya nuni patenakay.
S.PHON: na itija i a ira ku pikinkin piħija pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ na nu ħija nuni patənakaj.
S.FORM: na itiya i a ira ku pikinkin pihiya pitahidang na nu hiya nuni patenakay.
S.PHON: na itija i a ira ku pikinkin piħija pitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ na nu ħija nuni patənakaj.
S.TRANSL: 從那時,有傳教士打電話邀請我當傳教士.
From then on, a preacher called me to invite me to become a preacher.

S.FORM: tu anu mangalay mitilid mama'an mitilid ta mala patenakay kisu sa'an.
S.PHON: tu anu maŋaɾaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ mamaʡan mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ta maɾa patənakaj kisu saʡan.
S.FORM: tu anu mangalay mitilid mama'an mitilid ta mala patenakay kisu sa'an.
S.PHON: tu anu maŋaɾaj mitiɾiɬ~ɮ mamaʡan mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ta maɾa patənakaj kisu saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 如果你想念書,可以讀書,直到你成為傳教者,如是說.
If you want to study, you can study and become a preacher.

S.FORM: makanid ku falucu' aku.
S.PHON: makaniɬ~ɮ ku faɾuʦuʡ aku.
S.FORM: makanid ku falucu' aku.
S.PHON: makaniɬ~ɮ ku faɾuʦuʡ aku.

TRANSL.notes: 我很期盼(變成一個傳教士).

S.TRANSL: 我很期盼 .

TRANSL.notes: I was eager (to be a preacher).

S.TRANSL: I was eager .

S.FORM: talacuwa ca'ay kaedeng ku mali ku tayal nu malingaday nika a halili sa ku mama atu ina aku a mihayda.
S.PHON: taɾaʦuwa ʦaʡaj kaəɬ~ɮəŋ ku maɾi ku tajaɾ nu maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj nika a ħaɾiɾi sa ku mama atu ina aku a miħajɬ~ɮa.
S.FORM: talacuwa ca'ay kaedeng ku mali ku tayal nu malingaday nika a halili sa ku mama atu ina aku a mihayda.
S.PHON: taɾaʦuwa ʦaʡaj kaəɬ~ɮəŋ ku maɾi ku tajaɾ nu maɾiŋaɬ~ɮaj nika a ħaɾiɾi sa ku mama atu ina aku a miħajɬ~ɮa.
S.TRANSL: 雖然農夫的生活非常不足,但是我的爸爸媽媽勉強答應.
There was a shortage of workers at the farm, my father and mother grudgingly agreed.

S.FORM: ta mitild kaku.
S.PHON: ta mitiɾɬ~ɮ kaku.
S.FORM: ta mitild kaku.
S.PHON: ta mitiɾɬ~ɮ kaku.
S.TRANSL: 然後我讀書.
Then I studied.

S.FORM: na maharek ka mitilid haw i a alumanalumantu ku sarikaka itini i.
S.PHON: na maħarək ka mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ħaw i a aɾumanaɾumantu ku sarikaka itini i.
S.FORM: na maharek ka mitilid haw i a alumanalumantu ku sarikaka itini i.
S.PHON: na maħarək ka mitiɾiɬ~ɮ ħaw i a aɾumanaɾumantu ku sarikaka itini i.
S.TRANSL: 我畢業後,有很多信徒.
After I graduated, there were many disciples.

S.FORM: mala a singsi tu nu itiniay kaku patenak.
S.PHON: maɾa a siŋsi tu nu itiniaj kaku patənak.
S.FORM: mala a singsi tu nu itiniay kaku patenak.
S.PHON: maɾa a siŋsi tu nu itiniaj kaku patənak.
S.TRANSL: 我成為老師在這裡宣教.
I became a teacher here, preaching.

S.FORM: ca'ay ka itini a c'cay unini anu changping a kuan tangansa i makuta'ay.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj ka itini a ʦʡʦaj unini anu ʦħaŋpiŋ a kuan taŋansa i makutaʡaj.
S.FORM: ca'ay ka itini a c'cay unini anu changping a kuan tangansa i makuta'ay.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj ka itini a ʦʡʦaj unini anu ʦħaŋpiŋ a kuan taŋansa i makutaʡaj.
S.TRANSL: 不止這裡一處,還從長濱到大港口.
Not only here, I also went to Changbin and the port.

S.FORM: ca kapitulas kaku a mirakat a mi patenak tu suwal nu kawas.
S.PHON: ʦa kapituɾas kaku a mirakat a mi patənak tu suwaɾ nu kawas.
S.FORM: ca kapitulas kaku a mirakat a mi patenak tu suwal nu kawas.
S.PHON: ʦa kapituɾas kaku a mirakat a mi patənak tu suwaɾ nu kawas.
S.TRANSL: 我不斷走路宣揚神的話語.
I kept preaching the words of God.

S.FORM: saka itiya i caho ka alumnan ku patenakay.
S.PHON: saka itija i ʦaħo~u ka aɾumnan ku patənakaj.
S.FORM: saka itiya i caho ka alumnan ku patenakay.
S.PHON: saka itija i ʦaħo~u ka aɾumnan ku patənakaj.
S.TRANSL: 那個時候沒有很多傳教士.
There weren't many preachers at that time.

S.FORM: a kaku a c'cay itini ci fodo' ku tihi aku.
S.PHON: a kaku a ʦʡʦaj itini ʦi fo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ ku tiħi aku.
S.FORM: a kaku a c'cay itini ci fodo' ku tihi aku.
S.PHON: a kaku a ʦʡʦaj itini ʦi fo~uɬ~ɮo~uʡ ku tiħi aku.

TRANSL.notes: 我一個人(傳教),有時跟我的同伴Fodo'.

S.TRANSL: 我一個人 ,有時跟我的同伴Fodo'.

TRANSL.notes: I (preached) on my own, or with Fodo' sometimes.

S.TRANSL: I on my own, or with Fodo' sometimes.

S.FORM: saka saaluman saaluman satu.
S.PHON: saka saaɾuman saaɾuman satu.
S.FORM: saka saaluman saaluman satu.
S.PHON: saka saaɾuman saaɾuman satu.
S.TRANSL: 後來傳教士就愈來愈多了.

TRANSL.notes: There were more and more (preachers) afterwards.

S.TRANSL: There were more and more afterwards.

S.FORM: na na nu iya i patirengtu kami tu kiokay itini.
S.PHON: na na nu ija i patirəŋtu kami tu kio~ukaj itini.
S.FORM: na na nu iya i patirengtu kami tu kiokay itini.
S.PHON: na na nu ija i patirəŋtu kami tu kio~ukaj itini.
S.TRANSL: 不久之後我們在這裡蓋教會.
And then we built a church here.

S.FORM: na patireng tu kiokay saka a sepat a miheca ira kuya na i padaka ci turis mi nanam tu suwal nu Amis.
S.PHON: na patirəŋ tu kio~ukaj saka a səpat a miħəʦa ira kuja na i paɬ~ɮaka ʦi turis mi nanam tu suwaɾ nu amis.
S.FORM: na patireng tu kiokay saka a sepat a miheca ira kuya na i padaka ci turis mi nanam tu suwal nu Amis.
S.PHON: na patirəŋ tu kio~ukaj saka a səpat a miħəʦa ira kuja na i paɬ~ɮaka ʦi turis mi nanam tu suwaɾ nu amis.
S.TRANSL: 我們建教會的第四年,有一個從美國來叫做Turis的人,來學習阿美語.
Four years after we built the church, Turis, who was from the States, came here to learn Amis.

S.FORM: saka matama nira kaku adihay ku pilicay nira.
S.PHON: saka matama nira kaku aɬ~ɮiħaj ku piɾiʦaj nira.
S.FORM: saka matama nira kaku adihay ku pilicay nira.
S.PHON: saka matama nira kaku aɬ~ɮiħaj ku piɾiʦaj nira.
S.TRANSL: 他找到我,問我很多問題.

TRANSL.notes: He found me and asked many (questions).

S.TRANSL: He found me and asked many .

S.FORM: ira ku tihi nira ci urok u roma satu a tihi ira ci tuana.
S.PHON: ira ku tiħi nira ʦi uro~uk u ro~uma satu a tiħi ira ʦi tuana.
S.FORM: ira ku tihi nira ci urok u roma satu a tihi ira ci tuana.
S.PHON: ira ku tiħi nira ʦi uro~uk u ro~uma satu a tiħi ira ʦi tuana.
S.TRANSL: 他有同伴,像Urok,其次的同伴呢,有Tuana.
He had a companion, Urok; another was Tuana.

S.FORM: e ca'ay ka matiya uni urok acu tu atu ni tuana kuya pitengil nira tu pasifana' aku saka.
S.PHON: ə ʦaʡaj ka matija uni uro~uk aʦu tu atu ni tuana kuja pitəŋiɾ nira tu pasifanaʡ aku saka.
S.FORM: e ca'ay ka matiya uni urok acu tu atu ni tuana kuya pitengil nira tu pasifana' aku saka.
S.PHON: ə ʦaʡaj ka matija uni uro~uk aʦu tu atu ni tuana kuja pitəŋiɾ nira tu pasifanaʡ aku saka.

TRANSL.notes: 他發現不像Urok和Tuana(說的話),當他聽了我教他之後.

S.TRANSL: 他發現不像Urok和Tuana ,當他聽了我教他之後.
After he heard what I taught him, he found that it was different from what Urok and Tuana spoke.

S.FORM: repethan nira kaku.
S.PHON: rəpətħan nira kaku.
S.FORM: repethan nira kaku.
S.PHON: rəpətħan nira kaku.
S.TRANSL: 他抓住我.
He grabbed hold of me.

S.FORM: kisutu ku malutihi aku a mihiya minanam tu tilid nu Amis.
S.PHON: kisutu ku maɾutiħi aku a miħija minanam tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu amis.
S.FORM: kisutu ku malutihi aku a mihiya minanam tu tilid nu Amis.
S.PHON: kisutu ku maɾutiħi aku a miħija minanam tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu amis.
S.TRANSL: 你成為我學習阿美語的伴了.
You are my companion when I study Amis.

S.FORM: mifalic kita tu fangcalay a cutad sa'an.
S.PHON: mifaɾiʦ kita tu faŋʦaɾaj a ʦutaɬ~ɮ saʡan.
S.FORM: mifalic kita tu fangcalay a cutad sa'an.
S.PHON: mifaɾiʦ kita tu faŋʦaɾaj a ʦutaɬ~ɮ saʡan.
S.TRANSL: 我們來翻譯聖經.

TRANSL.notes: Let us translate the Bible (into Amis).

S.TRANSL: Let us translate the Bible .

S.FORM: saka na itiya misatapangtu kaku a patihi cingranan.
S.PHON: saka na itija misatapaŋtu kaku a patiħi ʦiŋranan.
S.FORM: saka na itiya misatapangtu kaku a patihi cingranan.
S.PHON: saka na itija misatapaŋtu kaku a patiħi ʦiŋranan.
S.TRANSL: 從那時起,我開始與他作伴.
From then on, I started to accompany him.

S.FORM: tu lipalipay tayra itini i sinku i luma' nira a patihi minanam tu ti tu suwal nu Amis cingra.
S.PHON: tu ɾipaɾipaj tajra itini i sinku i ɾumaʡ nira a patiħi minanam tu ti tu suwaɾ nu amis ʦiŋra.
S.FORM: tu lipalipay tayra itini i sinku i luma' nira a patihi minanam tu ti tu suwal nu Amis cingra.
S.PHON: tu ɾipaɾipaj tajra itini i sinku i ɾumaʡ nira a patiħi minanam tu ti tu suwaɾ nu amis ʦiŋra.
S.TRANSL: 每個星期,我都去他新港的家作陪,陪他學阿美語.
Every week, I went to his house at Hsinkang so that he could study Amis with me.

S.FORM: ta mifalic kami tu fangcalay cutad.
S.PHON: ta mifaɾiʦ kami tu faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: ta mifalic kami tu fangcalay cutad.
S.PHON: ta mifaɾiʦ kami tu faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ.

TRANSL.notes: 然後我們(開始)翻譯聖經.

S.TRANSL: 然後我們 翻譯聖經.

TRANSL.notes: And then we translated the Bible (into Amis).

S.TRANSL: And then we translated the Bible .

S.FORM: u saka itiyaho awa'ayho ku tilid nu Amis awaayho ku fangcalay cutad.
S.PHON: u saka itijaħo~u awaʡajħo~u ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu amis awaajħo~u ku faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: u saka itiyaho awa'ayho ku tilid nu Amis awaayho ku fangcalay cutad.
S.PHON: u saka itijaħo~u awaʡajħo~u ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu amis awaajħo~u ku faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ.

TRANSL.notes: 那時還沒有阿美語的文字,(因此)還沒有(阿美語的)聖經.

S.TRANSL: 那時還沒有阿美語的文字, 還沒有 聖經.
At that time there was no written Amis, so there was no Amis Bible.

S.FORM: na ira ci turis mapatihi aku i.
S.PHON: na ira ʦi turis mapatiħi aku i.
S.FORM: na ira ci turis mapatihi aku i.
S.PHON: na ira ʦi turis mapatiħi aku i.

TRANSL.notes: 從有Turis(來)之後,我陪著(他).

S.TRANSL: 從有Turis 之後,我陪著 .

TRANSL.notes: After Turis came, I accompanied (him).

S.TRANSL: After Turis came, I accompanied .

S.FORM: itiyatu misatapang ira ku tilid nu niam u Amis.
S.PHON: itijatu misatapaŋ ira ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu niam u amis.
S.FORM: itiyatu misatapang ira ku tilid nu niam u Amis.
S.PHON: itijatu misatapaŋ ira ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu niam u amis.
S.TRANSL: 那時開始有了我們阿美族的文字.
Then we had written Amis.

S.FORM: ta macuwatitu.
S.PHON: ta maʦuwatitu.
S.FORM: ta macuwatitu.
S.PHON: ta maʦuwatitu.
S.TRANSL: 到後來慢慢擴散.

TRANSL.notes: (The written Amis) spread.

S.TRANSL: spread.

S.FORM: saayawayho i ca'ayay ka pihayda ku cengfu tu tu tunini tiya tu nu lomaci saka.
S.PHON: saajawajħo~u i ʦaʡajaj ka piħajɬ~ɮa ku ʦəŋfu tu tu tunini tija tu nu ɾo~umaʦi saka.
S.FORM: saayawayho i ca'ayay ka pihayda ku cengfu tu tu tunini tiya tu nu lomaci saka.
S.PHON: saajawajħo~u i ʦaʡajaj ka piħajɬ~ɮa ku ʦəŋfu tu tu tunini tija tu nu ɾo~umaʦi saka.
S.TRANSL: 最當初的時候,政府不同意羅馬文字.
The government did not approve of the use of the Roman alphabet.

S.FORM: u cu'infuhaw tiya tilid nu Amis.
S.PHON: u ʦuʡinfuħaw tija tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu amis.
S.FORM: u cu'infuhaw tiya tilid nu Amis.
S.PHON: u ʦuʡinfuħaw tija tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu amis.

TRANSL.notes: (於是)阿美語文字是注音符號.

S.TRANSL: 阿美語文字是注音符號.

TRANSL.notes: (So) we used Zhuyin symbols to transcribe Amis words.

S.TRANSL: we used Zhuyin symbols to transcribe Amis words.

S.FORM: uraanho ku tilid saka minanam.
S.PHON: uraanħo~u ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ saka minanam.
S.FORM: uraanho ku tilid saka minanam.
S.PHON: uraanħo~u ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ saka minanam.

TRANSL.notes: (我們)還用那樣子的文字學習.

S.TRANSL: 還用那樣子的文字學習.
We learned Amis that way.

S.FORM: saka na itiya misatapang tangasa itini i i hiya itini i i enem a polo' ira ku lima mehica'an aku a mipat a mi falic tu fangcalay cutad.
S.PHON: saka na itija misatapaŋ taŋasa itini i i ħija itini i i ənəm a po~uɾo~uʡ ira ku ɾima məħiʦaʡan aku a mipat a mi faɾiʦ tu faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: saka na itiya misatapang tangasa itini i i hiya itini i i enem a polo' ira ku lima mehica'an aku a mipat a mi falic tu fangcalay cutad.
S.PHON: saka na itija misatapaŋ taŋasa itini i i ħija itini i i ənəm a po~uɾo~uʡ ira ku ɾima məħiʦaʡan aku a mipat a mi faɾiʦ tu faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 從那時候開始,一直到65歲,從事翻譯聖經的工作.

TRANSL.notes: From then on until I was 65, I took on the task of translating the Bible (into Amis).

S.TRANSL: From then on until I was 65, I took on the task of translating the Bible .

S.FORM: na nu iya i minukaytu ci turis tayra i padaka iratu ku fa'eluhay a a xuanjiaoshi ci afan.
S.PHON: na nu ija i minukajtu ʦi turis tajra i paɬ~ɮaka iratu ku faʡəɾuħaj a a xuanjiao~usħi ʦi afan.
S.FORM: na nu iya i minukaytu ci turis tayra i padaka iratu ku fa'eluhay a a xuanjiaoshi ci afan.
S.PHON: na nu ija i minukajtu ʦi turis tajra i paɬ~ɮaka iratu ku faʡəɾuħaj a a xuanjiao~usħi ʦi afan.
S.TRANSL: Turis回美國後,有了一位新的宣教師,Afan.

TRANSL.notes: (After) Turis returned to the States, there was a new preacher, Afan.

S.TRANSL: Turis returned to the States, there was a new preacher, Afan.

S.FORM: ta ci afantu kuni patuludang ni turis tu sapifalic.
S.PHON: ta ʦi afantu kuni patuɾuɬ~ɮaŋ ni turis tu sapifaɾiʦ.
S.FORM: ta ci afantu kuni patuludang ni turis tu sapifalic.
S.PHON: ta ʦi afantu kuni patuɾuɬ~ɮaŋ ni turis tu sapifaɾiʦ.

TRANSL.notes: (之後)Turis把翻譯工作委託給Afan.

S.TRANSL: Turis把翻譯工作委託給Afan.
Turis entrusted the task of Bible translation to Afan.

S.FORM: saka ci afantu ku tihi ni aku a mi falic tu tilid.
S.PHON: saka ʦi afantu ku tiħi ni aku a mi faɾiʦ tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: saka ci afantu ku tihi ni aku a mi falic tu tilid.
S.PHON: saka ʦi afantu ku tiħi ni aku a mi faɾiʦ tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ.

TRANSL.notes: Afan成了我的同伴,翻譯(阿美)文字.

S.TRANSL: Afan成了我的同伴,翻譯 文字.
Afan and I translated the Bible together.

S.FORM: saka anu haratengen aku i a a a tulu a polo' ku mehica'an aku a matayal tu uni suwal nu Amis a mipalatilid.
S.PHON: saka anu ħaratəŋən aku i a a a tuɾu a po~uɾo~uʡ ku məħiʦaʡan aku a matajaɾ tu uni suwaɾ nu amis a mipaɾatiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: saka anu haratengen aku i a a a tulu a polo' ku mehica'an aku a matayal tu uni suwal nu Amis a mipalatilid.
S.PHON: saka anu ħaratəŋən aku i a a a tuɾu a po~uɾo~uʡ ku məħiʦaʡan aku a matajaɾ tu uni suwaɾ nu amis a mipaɾatiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 回憶當時,我三十年的工作,將阿美語文字化.
In retrospect, I spent thirty years developing a writing system for Amis.

S.FORM: saka haratengen aku i hatay anu ca'ay ka tayni ci turis anu ca'ay ka ulah kaku a mipatihi ku ca ka citilid kami u Amis.
S.PHON: saka ħaratəŋən aku i ħataj anu ʦaʡaj ka tajni ʦi turis anu ʦaʡaj ka uɾaħ kaku a mipatiħi ku ʦa ka ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮ kami u amis.
S.FORM: saka haratengen aku i hatay anu ca'ay ka tayni ci turis anu ca'ay ka ulah kaku a mipatihi ku ca ka citilid kami u Amis.
S.PHON: saka ħaratəŋən aku i ħataj anu ʦaʡaj ka tajni ʦi turis anu ʦaʡaj ka uɾaħ kaku a mipatiħi ku ʦa ka ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮ kami u amis.
S.TRANSL: 我想,還好!如果Turis沒來,如果我不喜歡跟他作伴,我們就不會將阿美語文字化了.
I thought if Turis hadn't come, or if I had not liked his company, we would not have developed a writing system for Amis.

S.FORM: sa ku falucu' aku a ma ulah.
S.PHON: sa ku faɾuʦuʡ aku a ma uɾaħ.
S.FORM: sa ku falucu' aku a ma ulah.
S.PHON: sa ku faɾuʦuʡ aku a ma uɾaħ.
S.TRANSL: 這是我心理所慶幸的.
I felt gratified.

S.FORM: saanini satu i citilidtu i.
S.PHON: saanini satu i ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮtu i.
S.FORM: saanini satu i citilidtu i.
S.PHON: saanini satu i ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮtu i.
S.TRANSL: 現在有文字了.

TRANSL.notes: Now (we) have written Amis.

S.TRANSL: Now have written Amis.

S.FORM: fangcalitu maulahtu ku alumanay a misaosi tu fangcalay cutad.
S.PHON: faŋʦaɾitu mauɾaħtu ku aɾumanaj a misao~usi tu faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: fangcalitu maulahtu ku alumanay a misaosi tu fangcalay cutad.
S.PHON: faŋʦaɾitu mauɾaħtu ku aɾumanaj a misao~usi tu faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 很好的是有很多人閱讀聖經.
It is good that many people read the Bible.

S.FORM: malatilidtu malalentu ku caciaw.
S.PHON: maɾatiɾiɬ~ɮtu maɾaɾəntu ku ʦaʦiaw.
S.FORM: malatilidtu malalentu ku caciaw.
S.PHON: maɾatiɾiɬ~ɮtu maɾaɾəntu ku ʦaʦiaw.
S.TRANSL: 有了文字,話語就統一了.
Our speech was unified as we had a writing system.

S.FORM: itiyaho yu awaho kuna as a ku tilid nu Amis i ca kalecad ku caciaw nu Amis atu timul atu i sifu'ay.
S.PHON: itijaħo~u ju awaħo~u kuna as a ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu amis i ʦa kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ku ʦaʦiaw nu amis atu timuɾ atu i sifuʡaj.
S.FORM: itiyaho yu awaho kuna as a ku tilid nu Amis i ca kalecad ku caciaw nu Amis atu timul atu i sifu'ay.
S.PHON: itijaħo~u ju awaħo~u kuna as a ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu amis i ʦa kaɾəʦaɬ~ɮ ku ʦaʦiaw nu amis atu timuɾ atu i sifuʡaj.
S.TRANSL: 那時還沒有阿美文字的時候,阿美語南方的語言和中部不同.
At the time when there was no writing system of Amis, the Amis spoken in the south was different from that spoken in the central area.

S.FORM: saka u kami u cangping ni unu sifu' kami saka.
S.PHON: saka u kami u ʦaŋpiŋ ni unu sifuʡ kami saka.
S.FORM: saka u kami u cangping ni unu sifu' kami saka.
S.PHON: saka u kami u ʦaŋpiŋ ni unu sifuʡ kami saka.
S.TRANSL: 我們長濱在中間.
Changbin is located in the middle.

S.FORM: unu sifu' a suwal ku piaocun anini nu suwal niam u Amis.
S.PHON: unu sifuʡ a suwaɾ ku piao~uʦunɾm* anini nu suwaɾ niam u amis.
S.FORM: unu sifu' a suwal ku piaocun anini nu suwal niam u Amis.
S.PHON: unu sifuʡ a suwaɾ ku piao~uʦunɾm* anini nu suwaɾ niam u amis.
S.TRANSL: 現在以中間的話作為我們的標準阿美語.
Now the Amis spoken in the central area is considered the standard speech.

S.FORM: na ira kunini a fangcalay cutad wa malecadtu ku caciaw.
S.PHON: na ira kunini a faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ wa maɾəʦaɬ~ɮtu ku ʦaʦiaw.
S.FORM: na ira kunini a fangcalay cutad wa malecadtu ku caciaw.
S.PHON: na ira kunini a faŋʦaɾaj ʦutaɬ~ɮ wa maɾəʦaɬ~ɮtu ku ʦaʦiaw.
S.TRANSL: 從有了聖經之後,話語統一了.
Our speech was unified after we had an Amis Bible.

S.FORM: mialatu kuya amisay mialatu ku i timulay tu nini u suwal saka lalen satu saka.
S.PHON: miaɾatu kuja amisaj miaɾatu ku i timuɾaj tu nini u suwaɾ saka ɾaɾən satu saka.
S.FORM: mialatu kuya amisay mialatu ku i timulay tu nini u suwal saka lalen satu saka.
S.PHON: miaɾatu kuja amisaj miaɾatu ku i timuɾaj tu nini u suwaɾ saka ɾaɾən satu saka.
S.TRANSL: 北部的採用了,南部的也採用了這樣子的話語.
Both the north and south areas adopted the unified speech.

S.FORM: unini a nika citilidtu ku sakala c'cay nu hiya nunini u u tilid nu a ku suwal nunini nu Amis.
S.PHON: unini a nika ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮtu ku sakaɾa ʦʡʦaj nu ħija nunini u u tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu a ku suwaɾ nunini nu amis.
S.FORM: unini a nika citilidtu ku sakala c'cay nu hiya nunini u u tilid nu a ku suwal nunini nu Amis.
S.PHON: unini a nika ʦitiɾiɬ~ɮtu ku sakaɾa ʦʡʦaj nu ħija nunini u u tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu a ku suwaɾ nunini nu amis.
S.TRANSL: 所以文字化了,阿美的話語合而為一.
The Amis language was unified as there was a writing system.

S.FORM: saka u aarayen kuninian mikansia tu pikelid nu kawas sa ku falucu' nu u maku.
S.PHON: saka u aarajən kuninian mikansia tu pikəɾiɬ~ɮ nu kawas sa ku faɾuʦuʡ nu u maku.
S.FORM: saka u aarayen kuninian mikansia tu pikelid nu kawas sa ku falucu' nu u maku.
S.PHON: saka u aarajən kuninian mikansia tu pikəɾiɬ~ɮ nu kawas sa ku faɾuʦuʡ nu u maku.
S.TRANSL: 所以感謝,感謝神的引領,我是這樣想的.
We thank God for guiding us; that's what I think.

S.FORM: e kaku i ca'ayay kaku pitilid tu takaraway tu pitilidan nawhani u siawsuei ku pitilidan aku.
S.PHON: ə kaku i ʦaʡajaj kaku pitiɾiɬ~ɮ tu takarawaj tu pitiɾiɬ~ɮan nawħani u siawsuəi ku pitiɾiɬ~ɮan aku.
S.FORM: e kaku i ca'ayay kaku pitilid tu takaraway tu pitilidan nawhani u siawsuei ku pitilidan aku.
S.PHON: ə kaku i ʦaʡajaj kaku pitiɾiɬ~ɮ tu takarawaj tu pitiɾiɬ~ɮan nawħani u siawsuəi ku pitiɾiɬ~ɮan aku.
S.TRANSL: 我呢,我沒有讀到很高的學校,因為,我只有讀小學.
I did not receive higher education because I only attended elementary school.

S.FORM: uni kaulah aku a mi saosi tu cutad ku sakafana' aku tu mama'an a demakan.
S.PHON: uni kauɾaħ aku a mi sao~usi tu ʦutaɬ~ɮ ku sakafanaʡ aku tu mamaʡan a ɬ~ɮəmakan.
S.FORM: uni kaulah aku a mi saosi tu cutad ku sakafana' aku tu mama'an a demakan.
S.PHON: uni kauɾaħ aku a mi sao~usi tu ʦutaɬ~ɮ ku sakafanaʡ aku tu mamaʡan a ɬ~ɮəmakan.
S.TRANSL: 我喜歡讀聖經,這使我了解任何事情.
I like reading the Bible, which helped me learn about many things.

S.FORM: anini a a pahanhantu kaku.
S.PHON: anini a a paħanħantu kaku.
S.FORM: anini a a pahanhantu kaku.
S.PHON: anini a a paħanħantu kaku.
S.TRANSL: 現在,我休息了.
Now I have retired.

S.FORM: e u pi u katayal aku i kiokay ta e e e e lima a polo' ku mehica'an aku a mikerid tu kiokay.
S.PHON: ə u pi u katajaɾ aku i kio~ukaj ta ə ə ə ə ɾima a po~uɾo~uʡ ku məħiʦaʡan aku a mikəriɬ~ɮ tu kio~ukaj.
S.FORM: e u pi u katayal aku i kiokay ta e e e e lima a polo' ku mehica'an aku a mikerid tu kiokay.
S.PHON: ə u pi u katajaɾ aku i kio~ukaj ta ə ə ə ə ɾima a po~uɾo~uʡ ku məħiʦaʡan aku a mikəriɬ~ɮ tu kio~ukaj.
S.TRANSL: 我在教會工作,呃,五十年,帶領教會.
I have been working for the church for fifty years, leading the church.

S.FORM: saka yu mituisiu kaku i pitu polo' ira ku lima mehica'an aku.
S.PHON: saka ju mituisiu kaku i pitu po~uɾo~uʡ ira ku ɾima məħiʦaʡan aku.
S.FORM: saka yu mituisiu kaku i pitu polo' ira ku lima mehica'an aku.
S.PHON: saka ju mituisiu kaku i pitu po~uɾo~uʡ ira ku ɾima məħiʦaʡan aku.
S.TRANSL: 我七十五歲時退休.

S.FORM: ta a na nu iya pahanhan satu tangansa anini kunini pahanhan.
S.PHON: ta a na nu ija paħanħan satu taŋansa anini kunini paħanħan.
S.FORM: ta a na nu iya pahanhan satu tangansa anini kunini pahanhan.
S.PHON: ta a na nu ija paħanħan satu taŋansa anini kunini paħanħan.
S.TRANSL: 到那時候在休息,到現在還是在休息.
At that time I was resting; now I'm still resting.

S.FORM: nikawrila pahanhan sa aku i nikawrila ku pipadang aku tu mamangay a kiokay itini i yongfu tu atu takumi.
S.PHON: nikawriɾa paħanħan sa aku i nikawriɾa ku pipaɬ~ɮaŋ aku tu mamaŋaj a kio~ukaj itini i jo~uŋfu tu atu takumi.
S.FORM: nikawrila pahanhan sa aku i nikawrila ku pipadang aku tu mamangay a kiokay itini i yongfu tu atu takumi.
S.PHON: nikawriɾa paħanħan sa aku i nikawriɾa ku pipaɬ~ɮaŋ aku tu mamaŋaj a kio~ukaj itini i jo~uŋfu tu atu takumi.
S.TRANSL: 雖然我休息,我還是幫忙一些小教會,在永福和田組這裡.
Although I have retired, I still help small churches here like those in Yongfu and Takumi.

S.FORM: a cacaliw sa kaku a tayra tuna tusa a kiukay a mi padang.
S.PHON: a ʦaʦaɾiw sa kaku a tajra tuna tusa a kiukaj a mi paɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.FORM: a cacaliw sa kaku a tayra tuna tusa a kiukay a mi padang.
S.PHON: a ʦaʦaɾiw sa kaku a tajra tuna tusa a kiukaj a mi paɬ~ɮaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 我輪流去這二個教會幫忙.
I go to both churches in turn to help.

S.FORM: anu ca'ho ka a patay mima'an a mitulas sa ku falucu' aku a maulah.
S.PHON: anu ʦaʡħo~u ka a pataj mimaʡan a mituɾas sa ku faɾuʦuʡ aku a mauɾaħ.
S.FORM: anu ca'ho ka a patay mima'an a mitulas sa ku falucu' aku a maulah.
S.PHON: anu ʦaʡħo~u ka a pataj mimaʡan a mituɾas sa ku faɾuʦuʡ aku a mauɾaħ.
S.TRANSL: 如果沒有死的話,幹麻要停止呢?
As long as I'm not dead yet, why would I stop doing what I like?

S.FORM: matayal unu kawas kuni a tayal sa ku ulah nu falucu' aku u sakalipahak aku ku pita'ong tu kawas.
S.PHON: matajaɾ unu kawas kuni a tajaɾ sa ku uɾaħ nu faɾuʦuʡ aku u sakaɾipaħak aku ku pitaʡo~uŋ tu kawas.
S.FORM: matayal unu kawas kuni a tayal sa ku ulah nu falucu' aku u sakalipahak aku ku pita'ong tu kawas.
S.PHON: matajaɾ unu kawas kuni a tajaɾ sa ku uɾaħ nu faɾuʦuʡ aku u sakaɾipaħak aku ku pitaʡo~uŋ tu kawas.
S.TRANSL: 侍奉神的工作是我心理所慶幸的,敬拜神讓我很快樂.
It gratifies me to serve God; it gladdens me to serve God.

S.FORM: saka anini i cacaytu kaku.
S.PHON: saka anini i ʦaʦajtu kaku.
S.FORM: saka anini i cacaytu kaku.
S.PHON: saka anini i ʦaʦajtu kaku.
S.TRANSL: 現在我一個人了.
Now I'm alone.

S.FORM: a maemintu a matuas kunini wawa lalima ku wawa aku.
S.PHON: a maəmintu a matuas kunini wawa ɾaɾima ku wawa aku.
S.FORM: a maemintu a matuas kunini wawa lalima ku wawa aku.
S.PHON: a maəmintu a matuas kunini wawa ɾaɾima ku wawa aku.
S.TRANSL: 小孩子們全都長大了,我有五個小孩.
My children are all grown-up; I have five children.

S.FORM: tatusa ku fafahi'an tatulu ku fayinayan.
S.PHON: tatusa ku fafaħiʡan tatuɾu ku fajinajan.
S.FORM: tatusa ku fafahi'an tatulu ku fayinayan.
S.PHON: tatusa ku fafaħiʡan tatuɾu ku fajinajan.
S.TRANSL: 二個女的,三個男的.
Two daughters and three sons.

S.FORM: ta maemintu citayal.
S.PHON: ta maəmintu ʦitajaɾ.
S.FORM: ta maemintu citayal.
S.PHON: ta maəmintu ʦitajaɾ.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)全部都有工作了.

S.TRANSL: 全部都有工作了.
All of them have work.

S.FORM: saka a fangcal ku tayal nangra.
S.PHON: saka a faŋʦaɾ ku tajaɾ naŋra.
S.FORM: saka a fangcal ku tayal nangra.
S.PHON: saka a faŋʦaɾ ku tajaɾ naŋra.
S.TRANSL: 他們的工作很好.
They have good jobs.

S.FORM: fangcal kuni tireng nangra awaay ku adadaay.
S.PHON: faŋʦaɾ kuni tirəŋ naŋra awaaj ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj.
S.FORM: fangcal kuni tireng nangra awaay ku adadaay.
S.PHON: faŋʦaɾ kuni tirəŋ naŋra awaaj ku aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj.
S.TRANSL: 身體很健康.
They are healthy.

S.FORM: mahemak ku falucu' aku.
S.PHON: maħəmak ku faɾuʦuʡ aku.
S.FORM: mahemak ku falucu' aku.
S.PHON: maħəmak ku faɾuʦuʡ aku.
S.TRANSL: 我心裡很快樂.
I am satisfied.

S.FORM: nika talacuwa cacay kaku itini i luma' i pacina a minukay a milisu' cangra a patihi itini i takuwanan.
S.PHON: nika taɾaʦuwa ʦaʦaj kaku itini i ɾumaʡ i paʦina a minukaj a miɾisuʡ ʦaŋra a patiħi itini i takuwanan.
S.FORM: nika talacuwa cacay kaku itini i luma' i pacina a minukay a milisu' cangra a patihi itini i takuwanan.
S.PHON: nika taɾaʦuwa ʦaʦaj kaku itini i ɾumaʡ i paʦina a minukaj a miɾisuʡ ʦaŋra a patiħi itini i takuwanan.

TRANSL.notes: 然而,不管(他們)在哪裡,我一個人在家休息,他們會回來探訪,跟我作伴.

S.TRANSL: 然而,不管 在哪裡,我一個人在家休息,他們會回來探訪,跟我作伴.
Although I live alone at home, they would return to visit me and accompany me.

S.FORM: saka mananamtu kaku a cacay anini nika.
S.PHON: saka mananamtu kaku a ʦaʦaj anini nika.
S.FORM: saka mananamtu kaku a cacay anini nika.
S.PHON: saka mananamtu kaku a ʦaʦaj anini nika.
S.TRANSL: 雖然現在我習慣了一個人.
Although I have been used to being alone,

S.FORM: ira ku s s sakatusa aku a fafahiyan a wawa malasingsi i cangpingkuosiaw.
S.PHON: ira ku s s sakatusa aku a fafaħijan a wawa maɾasiŋsi i ʦaŋpiŋkuo~usiaw.
S.FORM: ira ku s s sakatusa aku a fafahiyan a wawa malasingsi i cangpingkuosiaw.
S.PHON: ira ku s s sakatusa aku a fafaħijan a wawa maɾasiŋsi i ʦaŋpiŋkuo~usiaw.
S.TRANSL: 我第二個女兒在長濱國小當老師.
My second daughter is teaching at Changbin Elementary School.

S.FORM: itini cingra a malu' saka citihi kaku.
S.PHON: itini ʦiŋra a maɾuʡ saka ʦitiħi kaku.
S.FORM: itini cingra a malu' saka citihi kaku.
S.PHON: itini ʦiŋra a maɾuʡ saka ʦitiħi kaku.
S.TRANSL: 她住在這裡和我作伴.
She lives here to accompany me.

S.FORM: ca'ay ka tu'ol kunini falucu' aku.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj ka tuʡo~uɾ kunini faɾuʦuʡ aku.
S.FORM: ca'ay ka tu'ol kunini falucu' aku.
S.PHON: ʦaʡaj ka tuʡo~uɾ kunini faɾuʦuʡ aku.
S.TRANSL: 我的心不覺得寂寞.
I don't feel lonely.

S.FORM: saka a hatira ku pasifana' aku tu ni nu rakat nu u urip aku hay.
S.PHON: saka a ħatira ku pasifanaʡ aku tu ni nu rakat nu u urip aku ħaj.
S.FORM: saka a hatira ku pasifana' aku tu ni nu rakat nu u urip aku hay.
S.PHON: saka a ħatira ku pasifanaʡ aku tu ni nu rakat nu u urip aku ħaj.
S.TRANSL: 我那樣子述說我的人生旅程,就是如此.
I have now told you about the journey of my life.
